[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101000101 4
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 001101111 6
4 101011110 6
5 001000000 1
6 100010101 4
7 110001000 3

01 10 001001110 4
12 21 001000000 1 match 5
23 32 000000000 a match 1 2
34 43 100000000 1
45 54 100001000 2
56 65 001001101 4
67 76 001000101 3
70 07 001000101 3

02 20 001000000 1 match 5
13 31 100010100 3
24 42 000000000 a match 1 2
35 53 100010101 4 match 6
46 64 000001000 1
57 75 101000101 4 match 0

71 17 101000100 3

25 52 001000000 1 match 5
36 63 000000101 2
47 74 100000000 1

61 16 001001100 3
72 27 001000000 1 match 5
